MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues, Against Cross Complainant Huanzhi Jiang
Off Calendar Apr-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen Wong, Esq. (415-9813880 ext.1) for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant/Moving party Tony Fong.
Eliza Wang, Esq. (408-289-8868) specially appearing for Defendant/Opposing party Huanzi Jiang

Plaintiff does not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT TONY FONG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues, Against Cross Complainant Huanzhi Jiang.Plaintiff's and Defendant's supplemental briefing is stricken. Supplemental briefing was allowed to address only those facts in the separate statement impacted by the order re: relief from admissions being deemed admitted. Plaintiff was not allowed to re-write the separate statement and not allowed to provide supplemental evidence as to the facts not impacted by the order. The ruling is based on the original briefing filed prior to March 14, 2016 hearing. Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party's evidence showed triable issues of fact. Moving party addressed the late-filed opposition on the merits, did not indicate any prejudice, and did not articulate any grounds for objection to any particular evidence presented by the opposing party. Multiple triable issues of fact include, but are not limited to, facts 3, 14, 16, etc. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
